conditions.text: A Boolean digital circuit is composed using two 4-input multiplexers (M1 and M2) and one 2-input multiplexer (M3), as shown in the figure.

targets.text: The select lines of the multiplexers are connected to Boolean variables A, B, and C as shown in the figure.
